emotional_tone: Professional, authoritative, trustworthy, bold, modern, transparent

headings.usage: H1 (text-6xl), H2 (text-4xl), heavily stylized for maximum impact

spacing_and_layout.philosophy: Generous spacing with strict grid-based alignment. No jagged edges.
spacing_and_layout.grid_system: Mode A (Tetris Grid) for marketing, Mode B (Control Room Grid) for dashboard.
spacing_and_layout.surface_strategy: Grid Borders (The 'Technical' Look). Expose the skeleton. Heavy use of 1px solid black borders (#0A0A0A) separating sections, eliminating shadows.

components_and_interactions.buttons: Square or very slightly rounded (rounded-sm). Solid black or solid Signal Red. High contrast hover states. Always include data-testid.
components_and_interactions.cards: Flat background, 1px solid black border, no shadow. Hover: slight lift (-translate-y-1) with a hard drop shadow (shadow-[4px_4px_0px_0px_rgba(10,10,10,1)]).
components_and_interactions.inputs: Shadcn components heavily customized. Square corners, 1px solid border, focus:ring-2 focus:ring-black focus:border-black.
components_and_interactions.motion: Lenis for momentum scrolling. Framer motion for text reveal on scroll. Immediate snappy transitions on hover.
components_and_interactions.testing_attributes: All interactive elements MUST have data-testid in kebab-case.

navigation.layout: Sticky header with glassmorphism (backdrop-blur-xl bg-[#F9F9F8]/80) and 1px solid bottom border.
navigation.elements: Logo (Morello Connally), Links (Services, Work, About), CTA (Book a Call - data-testid='nav-book-call-btn')

hero_section.layout: Massive typographic hero. Left aligned H1 (text-5xl md:text-7xl). Right column for supporting paragraph and dual CTAs.
hero_section.visuals: Abstract geometric art image as a structural side element or framed background.
hero_section.ctas: Primary: 'Book a call' (data-testid='hero-book-btn', Signal Red). Secondary: 'See packages' (data-testid='hero-packages-btn', Outline black).

about_founders_section.layout: Split 50/50 layout. Left: Crisp imagery of workspace/founders. Right: Bold typography introducing Ryan Morello and Ben Connally.
about_founders_section.style: Use the 'Editorial Ribbon' marquee below this section scrolling 'TRUSTED WEB DESIGN IN SAN FRANCISCO'.

services_pricing_section.layout: 3-column CSS Grid (border-collapse style). Each tier is a column with a 1px border. No gaps, pure grid lines.

tiers.name: Professional
tiers.description: Website with custom professional photos (taken and edited by us)

tiers.name: Premium
tiers.description: Website with credit card terminals, email list setup, meeting scheduler

services_pricing_section.add_on: Monthly maintenance: $10-$100/mo (Custom domain + upkeep). Styled as a stark banner below the tiers.

schedule_call_section.layout: Clean calendar integration UI using Shadcn Calendar. Left: 'Let's build something bold'. Right: Date/Time slot picker.

contact_location_section.layout: Massive text. 'San Francisco, CA'. Display both phone numbers in large typography (text-4xl).
contact_location_section.background: Golden Gate Bridge image with heavy black overlay (bg-black/60) to maintain high contrast for white text.

testimonials.layout: Asymmetric bento grid of quotes. Monochromatic, high typographic contrast.

footer.layout: Dark inverse footer (bg-[#0A0A0A] text-white). Massive 'MORELLO CONNALLY' logo. Links and contact info.

checkout_flow.layout: Minimalist centered card layout. Left side: Order summary. Right side: Stripe Checkout elements.
checkout_flow.components: Shadcn Forms, Inputs, Buttons. Highly sterile and trustworthy (Swiss Design).

admin_dashboard.layout: Strict 'Control Room Grid'. Dense, data-heavy. Sidebar navigation, top header.
admin_dashboard.sections: Login Page (centered stark form), Bookings View (Data Table), Purchases View (Data Table).
admin_dashboard.style: No rounded corners, pure 1px borders everywhere. Status badges use Signal Red for pending, Deep Black for completed.

hero_background.description: Framed minimalist abstract artwork in sunlit room. Use as a sophisticated artistic background element.

about_workspace.description: Aerial view of a bright creative workspace. Fits the agency founder narrative.

contact_location.description: Golden gate bridge surrounded by fog. Use in the Contact section to anchor the San Francisco location.

geometric_pattern.description: Bold geometric pattern with triangles. Use as subtle repeating texture or mask image.

instructions_to_main_agent: Install required dependencies: framer-motion, lenis, @phosphor-icons/react, tailwindcss, shadcn ui primitives.
Set up Tailwind configuration with the custom colors (Base, Surface, Inverse, Accent) and fonts (Cabinet Grotesk, Satoshi).
Build the Marketing Site applying the Swiss High-Contrast archetype. Prioritize stark black 1px borders instead of box-shadows. Use 'border-collapse' techniques for the pricing bento grid.
Implement Shadcn Calendar for the Scheduling section, customizing it to match the square, high-contrast theme.
Build a robust Stripe checkout UI that uses high-contrast text descriptors for clear, transparent pricing.
Implement the Admin Dashboard using a dense, control-room style grid layout with Shadcn Data Tables.
All interactive elements (buttons, forms, links) MUST contain a 'data-testid' attribute (e.g., data-testid='hero-book-btn').
Never use placeholder image URLs. Rely entirely on the provided media URLs.
Ensure the hero overlay opacity does not exceed bg-black/50, or use a gradient overlay to preserve image visibility while maintaining text contrast.
